entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the case study on customized information delivery is conducted

entities.name: KNOWLEDGE DATABASE
entities.description: A system that assembles agricultural data including land holding, soil analysis, cropping patterns, past yield, and fertilizer use

entities.name: LAND HOLDING
entities.description: Agricultural data relating to the size and ownership of land

entities.name: SOIL ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of analyzing soil properties to provide agricultural data

entities.name: CROPPING PATTERNS
entities.description: Data regarding the sequence and spatial arrangement of crops

entities.name: FERTILIZER USE
entities.description: Data regarding the application of fertilizers

entities.name: MOBILE PHONES
entities.description: Technology used to relay tailored information to farmers

entities.name: BROADCASTING
entities.description: A general method of information delivery with limited value for tailored needs

entities.name: NARROWCASTING
entities.description: A targeted method of information delivery that better serves farmers' needs

entities.name: TABLETS
entities.description: Devices used by farmer facilitators for data management and information sharing

entities.name: DRYLAND
entities.description: The environmental condition of the farming areas

relationships.description: Location of the case study implementing the database
